title: LCID - Lucid Group Inc Latest Stock News & Market Updates
text: StockTitan aggregates latest news and market updates on Lucid Group including earnings announcements, analyst upgrades/downgrades, funding news, and management commentary. Recent news dominated by Q1 2026 earnings miss and guidance suspension. Other key stories include new CEO appointment, workforce reduction, and expanded Uber partnership. The news feed reflects volatile sentiment swings based on operational developments. Positive developments like production milestones and partnership expansion offset by concerns about losses, cash burn, and profitability timelines. The news volume suggests significant investor interest despite negative momentum.
